title: You and Me
writer: Virginia Van Upp, Norman Krasna, Jack Moffitt
actors: Sylvia Sidney, George Raft, Barton MacLane
plot: An altruistic department-store owner hires ex-convicts in order to give them a second chance at life. Unfortunately, one of the convicts he hires recruits two of his fellow ex-convicts in a plan to rob the store.
